metadata.defaultDescription: N4 Salon Kuwait — luxury hair, colour, nails, makeup, lashes, and bridal beauty. Private appointments, refined finishes, and calm, attentive service in Kuwait City.

home.title: Home
home.description: Discover N4 Salon in Kuwait City — editorial hair and makeup, precision nails, bridal artistry, and discreet home visits, by appointment.

services.title: Services
services.description: Explore our full menu of hair, nails, makeup, lashes & brows, bridal beauty, and at-home services — each treatment tailored to you.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.description: See colour, texture, and finish the N4 way — a curated look at our work across hair, skin, nails, and bridal.

about.title: About
about.description: N4 Salon is a Kuwait beauty destination built on craft, discretion, and elevated service — hair, nails, and makeup under one roof.

booking.description: Request your next visit at N4 Salon — our team confirms every booking personally by phone or WhatsApp.

contact.title: Contact

whatsapp.prefill: Hello N4 Salon — I’d love to book an appointment. Please let me know your next availability.

hero.title: Beauty, composed in quiet.
hero.description: From lived-in colour to glass-skin makeup and immaculate nails — every visit is unhurried, attentive, and finished like it matters. Step in for polish that feels effortless, never loud.
hero.quote: “The quietest rooms hold the truest luxury.”

brandIntro.p1: We designed N4 as a place to exhale: soft light, uncluttered stations, and artists who listen before they lift a brush. You arrive as you are — you leave feeling unmistakably yourself, only refined.
brandIntro.p2: Appointments are paced with care: time to consult, to settle, and to walk back into your day with hair, skin, and nails that feel as good as they look.

featured.title: A first taste of N4
featured.description: Three favourites our clients return for — each one delivered with the same patience and precision you’ll find across our full menu.

why.title: Precision, calm, and care you can feel.
why.intro: We’re here for clients who notice the small things — a seamless blend at the root, skin that looks like skin, a morning that starts on time. That’s the N4 standard.

p1.title: Space to breathe
p1.text: No rushed chairs or overlapping voices — just unhurried service, soft sound, and room to enjoy the ritual.

p2.title: Camera-ready, real-life beautiful
p2.text: Hair and makeup that look as stunning in daylight as they do in photographs — never heavy, never dated.

p3.title: Bridal & events you can trust
p3.text: Clear timelines, punctual artists, and a team that shows up calm — so you can stay in the moment.

bridal.title: The morning you’ve pictured — beautifully orchestrated.
bridal.description: From trials and tweaks to the final veil moment, we design hair and makeup around your timeline, your dress, and your light. For you and your closest circle — composed, serene, unforgettable.

galleryPreview.title: Colour, craft, confidence
galleryPreview.description: A curated selection of our work — dimensional colour, immaculate nails, luminous skin, and bridal looks made for real memories.

testimonials.title: What Kuwait women tell us
testimonials.intro: Most of our clients find us through a friend. Here’s what a few have shared — in their own words — after sitting in our chairs.

instagram.title: On Instagram
instagram.description: Fresh colour, behind-the-scenes bridal mornings, and the little details we love — follow along from our Kuwait studio.

cta.title: We’d love to welcome you
cta.description: Tell us what you’re dreaming of — a colour refresh, event makeup, bridal prep, or a quiet hour just for you. We’ll match you with the right artist and time.

page.title: Treatments & experiences
page.intro: Every service begins with a conversation. Prices below are a guide — your stylist will confirm the exact investment after your consultation. At-home visits are available in selected areas of Kuwait.
page.ctaDescription: Share your hair goals, event date, or simply the mood you want — we’ll pair you with the right specialist and a time that fits your week.

t1.quote: My bridal trial felt like a collaboration, not a rush. They asked thoughtful questions, took their time with the trial, and the morning of the wedding ran exactly on schedule — I felt completely held.
t1.name: Sara A.

t2.quote: Finally a colourist who explains what my hair actually needs. The grow-out looks intentional, not messy, and I always leave knowing how to care for it between visits.
t2.name: Nour K.

t3.quote: I book at-home visits when my week won’t allow a salon trip — same attention to detail, same serene energy, and they’re always on time.
t3.name: Lulwa M.

page.heroImageAlt: N4 Salon interior — warm light and calm seating in Kuwait City
page.title: Kuwait’s salon for women who love quiet luxury.
page.storyP1: N4 was founded on a simple idea: true luxury is calm, considered, and never loud. Our artists are trained to listen first — then shape hair, nails, and makeup with the same discipline you’d expect from a high-end editorial team.
page.storyP2: Today we’re proud to be a trusted name in Kuwait City for women who expect discretion, punctuality, and results that look exquisite in real life — not only through a lens.
page.missionQuote: “We don’t follow every trend. We refine what makes you unmistakably you.”
page.valuesTitle: Standards you’ll notice in every visit
page.valuesDescription: Whether you’re in for a quick file-and-polish or a full bridal morning, these principles guide everything we do.

v1.title: Mastery over noise
v1.text: Our team trains continuously — in colour theory, skin-forward makeup, and nail architecture — so technique always leads.

v2.title: Time you can trust
v2.text: We quote realistic appointment lengths and honour them — your calendar matters as much as ours.

v3.title: Hospitality that soothes
v3.text: Soft light, intentional spacing between clients, and a floor that stays serene from the first hello to the final mist.

page.teamTitle: Meet a few of the team
page.teamDescription: These are the women behind your colour, your skin, and your nails — each hand-picked for skill, warmth, and an eye for detail.
page.ctaDescription: New guest or returning favourite — book a first visit, a colour refresh, or a bridal conversation. We’ll take it from there.

site.tagline: Kuwait City · Luxury beauty · By appointment

section.title: Hair mask collection
section.subtitle: Targeted treatments for shine, strength, and scalp health — layered like skincare, finished with salon precision.

hm-argan.name: Argan & Shea Deep Repair
hm-argan.preview: Weekly repair for dry lengths — argan oil and shea butter restore elasticity and a soft, expensive finish.
hm-argan.imageAlt: Jar of rich hair mask with botanical ingredients
hm-argan.description:
Our signature repair mask melts into dry, sensitized lengths with cold-pressed argan and whipped shea. It is designed to feel quiet and luxurious — never heavy — leaving hair supple, light-reflective, and easier to style.

Ideal after colour services, sun exposure, or whenever lengths feel thirsty. Leave on as directed by your stylist; finish with a cool rinse for extra shine.

hm-keratin.name: Keratin Silk Smoothing
hm-keratin.preview: Smoothing ritual for frizz-prone hair — keratin and silk amino acids polish the cuticle for glassy movement.
hm-keratin.imageAlt: Silky hair texture after keratin smoothing treatment
hm-keratin.description:
A smoothing mask that works at the cuticle level: keratin helps realign and seal, while silk amino acids add slip and fluidity. Hair feels touchably soft, with frizz reduced and movement preserved — never stiff or overly flat.

Best for clients who want polish without sacrificing body. Your artist will recommend timing based on texture and porosity.

hm-scalp.name: Scalp Detox & Balance
hm-scalp.preview: Cooling clay and botanicals clarify the scalp — the foundation for fuller, longer-lasting volume at the root.
hm-scalp.imageAlt: Spa-style scalp care with natural clay mask
hm-scalp.description:
Healthy hair begins at the root. This cooling treatment combines mineral-rich clay and purifying botanicals to lift build-up, balance oil, and refresh the scalp — without stripping.

Massage in slow, deliberate circles for a spa-like release. Follow with your prescribed conditioner on mid-lengths and ends. Perfect as a seasonal reset or before intensive repair rituals.

hm-rose.name: Rose & Honey Luminosity
hm-rose.preview: Radiance-boosting mask with rose water and honey extract — designed for dull hair that needs light and life.
hm-rose.imageAlt: Rose-infused beauty oil and honey for hair luminosity
hm-rose.description:
Inspired by skincare layering, this mask infuses rose hydrosol and honey extract to illuminate dull fibres and soften the feel of the hair surface. The result is a refined, lit-from-within shine — never glittery.

Use when hair looks matte or tired, or before events where you want hair to read luminous on camera. Pair with a cool blow-dry to amplify reflection.
